problem: Why do traumatic memories become locked and intrusive — what neural mechanism?
mechanism: Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI
hypothesis: If Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI is applied to what, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 36 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
